name: fpl-skills
description: Flagship workflow plugin for the ForgePlan ecosystem. 22 engineering skills + dev-advisor agent + 4 hooks. v1.18: PRD-022 Tier A — 4 high-traffic skills (riper, ddd-decompose, gh-project, c4-diagram) migrated to MCP-first with CLI fallback. ALL 16 of 22 skills now MCP-first (audit, autorun, briefing, build, diagnose, fpl-init, refine, research, restore, rfc, shape, sprint, riper, ddd-decompose, gh-project, c4-diagram); remaining 6 Tier B explicitly classified as no-forgeplan in descriptions. PRD-022 Phase 2 complete. v1.17.1: dev-advisor canonical-lint. AGENT-AUTHORING-GUIDE + CRUD-R-A matrix + Profile D + forgeplan_generate primary. LR-1..LR-7 lint rules.
